# Shopify

**Website:** https://shopify.com
**API docs:** https://shopify.dev
**Plan / tier:** Basic ($39/mo)
**Cloud or local:** cloud SaaS
**Last updated:** 2026-06-10

## Purpose

Storefront and order system of record.

## Records in this tool

- **order** — a customer purchase

## Integrations

- **Zapier** — new order triggers a Slack message
